void.string:
<xform:editShow>
     <script>
      AttachXFormValueChangeEventById("fd_way", function(value, domElement) {
        SetXFormFieldValueById("wayTemp", value, false);
        if (value == 11) {
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row10", true, true, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row4", true, true, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row11", true, true, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row111", true, true, true);
        } else if (value == 22) {
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row10", false, false, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row4", false, false, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row11", false, false, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row111", false, false, true);
        }
      });
     </script>
    </xform:editShow>
    <xform:viewShow>
     <script>
      Com_AddEventListener(window, "load", function() {
        var value = GetXFormFieldById("wayTemp")[0].value;
        if (value == 11) {
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row10", true, true, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row4", true, true, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row11", true, true, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row111", true, true, true);
        } else if (value == 22) {
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row10", false, false, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row4", false, false, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row11", false, false, false);
          common_dom_row_set_show_required_reset("invoice_row111", false, false, true);
        }
      });
     </script>
    </xform:viewShow>

<metadata> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_way" label="Entry mode" type="String" notNull="true"/> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_recipient" label="Recipient" type="String"/> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_remark" label="Remark" type="String"/> <extendSimpleProperty name="wayTemp" label="Entry mode helper" type="String"/> </metadata>
